title: Existing work-order item-condition row
definition: An informational row for an item condition already attached to the selected work order, including its cached next-check annotation.

facts.statement: An existing row renders the condition comparison and item description together with a separate next-check status annotation.
The annotation's wording and text attributes are selected from the condition's cached satisfaction result.

uncertainties.statement: The pinned corpus captures the unsatisfied annotation, but not the same existing row with a true cached result.

positive: A cached true result renders the satisfied annotation on an existing row.
boundary: Character, foreground, background, and brightness planes are checked for the annotation span only.
counterexamples: A cached false result renders the unsatisfied annotation without recoloring the comparison or item-description fragments.

absenceGuards: Do not color the whole row from the cached satisfaction result.

requiredFrames: The same existing row with a true cached result
The same existing row with a false cached result
